generate.title: QR Code Generator
generate.subtitle: Generate a QR code for any content type

hub.subtitle: Free, no signup, no watermarks. Your data never leaves your device.

url.pageDescription: Link to any website, app, or page. Free, no signup, no watermarks.
url.placeholder: Enter a URL above to see your QR code

wifi.pageDescription: Let guests join your network by scanning — no typing passwords.
wifi.placeholder: Enter a network name above to see your QR code

vcard.pageDescription: Scan to save contact info directly to your phone's address book.
vcard.placeholder: Enter a name above to see your QR code

sms.pageDescription: Scan to open a pre-filled text message on any phone.
sms.placeholder: Enter a phone number above to see your QR code

email.pageDescription: Scan to open a pre-filled email in any mail app.
email.placeholder: Enter an email address above to see your QR code

text.pageDescription: Encode any plain text — notes, addresses, codes, or anything else.
text.placeholder: Enter some text above to see your QR code

url.label: URL or link
url.hint: Paste any link — no account needed.

sms.hint: Scan to open a pre-filled SMS to this number.

email.subject: Subject
email.hint: Scan to open a pre-filled email.

text.label: Text
text.hint: Any text — notes, addresses, codes, or anything else.

history.title: Saved QR Codes
history.emptySubtitle: Generate and save a QR code to see it here

donate.title: Support Simplified QR
donate.subtitle: Your donation keeps this tool free and private
donate.alreadyDonor: You are already a supporter. Thank you!
donate.offlineMessage: An internet connection is required to donate.

success.title: Thank you!
success.message: You now have an ad-free experience.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailSent: Email sent! Check your inbox for instructions.
forgotPassword.checkEmail: Check your email for the reset link. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.invalidResetLink: Invalid reset link. Please request a new password reset.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long
resetPassword.passwordRequirement: Password must be at least 8 characters long
resetPassword.passwordUpdated: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: We sent you an email with a verification link. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your email address.
verifyEmail.emailSentTo: We've sent a verification link to
verifyEmail.clickLinkInstructions: Click the link in the email to verify your account. If you don't see the email, check your spam folder.
verifyEmail.verificationEmailSent: Verification email sent! Please check your inbox.
verifyEmail.pleaseWait: Please wait while we verify your email address.
verifyEmail.emailVerificationCompletedButLoginFailed: Email verification completed, but automatic login failed. Please try signing in manually.
verifyEmail.unexpectedErrorDuringVerification: An unexpected error occurred during verification
verifyEmail.accountVerifiedRedirect: Your account has been verified. You're now logged in and will be redirected shortly.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
